title: Parosela multifoliolata
taxonomy: Parosela multifoliolata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to Southeast Asia, specifically in countries such as Thailand, Malaysia, and Indonesia. The classification of Parosela multifoliolata is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Gentianales, and family Rubiaceae. Within the Rubiaceae family, Parosela multifoliolata is a member of the genus Parosela. The exact classification may be subject to change as new research and discoveries are made.
